title: JM's Fresh Animations
description: A compatibility pack for JM's Fixes and Fresh Animations
body:
This pack makes [JM's Fixes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jms-fixes) and [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) work together properly.

[FreshLX's Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/freshlx/tiers)
